overview: A premium restaurant showcase website for Matka Biryani — a luxurious yet minimal landing page with cinematic hero, signature dishes, brand story, testimonials, and a dark warm palette with gold and saffron accents.
features: Cinematic hero section with parallax and fade-in animations
Signature dishes grid with hover zoom effects
Brand story split layout with emotional storytelling
Why Choose Us with minimal line icons
Minimal dark footer with contact and social links
Serif headings with clean sans-serif body typography
